title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN TAGUGPO, MUNICIPALITY OF LUPON, PROVINCE OF DAVAO ORIENTAL, TO BE KNOWN AS THE TAGUGPO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING  FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 4652 / 93 OG No. 40, 6337 (Oct. 6, 1997)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8329, June 30, 1997 ]

AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN TAGUGPO, MUNICIPALITY OF LUPON, PROVINCE OF DAVAO ORIENTAL, TO BE KNOWN AS THE TAGUGPO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. There is hereby established, under the direct supervision of the Department of Education, Culture and Sports, a national high school in Tagugpo, Municipality of Lupon, Province of Davao Oriental, to be known as the Tagugpo National High School.

SEC. 2. The Secretary of Education, Culture and Sports shall implement this Act so as to make the school operational in the school year immediately following the effectivity thereof.

SEC. 3. The amount necessary to carry out the provisions of this Act shall be included in the General Appropriations Act of the year following its enactment into law and thereafter.

SEC. 4. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, Lapsed into law on June 30, 1997 without the signature of the President, in accordance with Article VI, Section 27 (1) of the Constitution.
